cards.back: A morphological operation that reduces the size of an object by removing pixels from its boundary
A morphological operation that increases the size of an object by adding pixels to its boundary
A morphological operation that combines erosion and dilation to remove noise and small objects from an image
A morphological operation that combines dilation and erosion to fill in small holes and gaps in an image
A morphological operation that uses a structuring element to perform a binary operation on an image based on a specified condition
